easy.title: The Matrix
easy.plot: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulation controlled by machines and joins a rebellion to free humanity.
easy.clue: A sleepless office worker learns reality has source code.

easy.title: Titanic
easy.plot: A wealthy young woman and a poor artist fall in love aboard a doomed ocean liner on its maiden voyage.
easy.clue: A brief romance sinks beneath class division and freezing water.

easy.title: Jurassic Park
easy.plot: Scientists clone dinosaurs for a theme park, but the creatures escape control and hunt the visitors.
easy.clue: Scientists resurrect extinction and immediately regret the business model.

easy.title: The Dark Knight
easy.plot: A masked vigilante faces a chaotic criminal mastermind who pushes a city and its heroes past moral limits.
easy.clue: A man in black fights chaos while slowly borrowing its methods.

easy.title: Forrest Gump
easy.plot: A kindhearted man with a simple outlook unintentionally witnesses and influences major moments in modern American history.
easy.clue: A gentle optimist accidentally speedruns decades of national history.

easy.plot: A farm boy joins rebels, rescues a princess, and helps attack a superweapon built by a galactic empire.
easy.clue: A desert nobody follows old faith and improbable aim into a galaxy-sized rebellion.

easy.title: The Lion King
easy.plot: A young lion prince flees after tragedy and later returns to reclaim his homeland from a cruel usurper.
easy.clue: Exile, guilt, and good advice eventually return a runaway heir to a broken kingdom.

easy.title: Back to the Future
easy.plot: A teenager travels to the past in a time machine and must ensure his parents fall in love to preserve his own future.
easy.clue: A teenager crashes into yesterday and must repair his own origin story.

easy.title: Jaws
easy.plot: A seaside town is terrorized by a giant shark while local leaders delay action for economic reasons.
easy.clue: A beach economy debates denial until the ocean starts auditing everyone.

easy.title: Avatar
easy.plot: A disabled marine inhabits an engineered body on an alien world and must choose between orders and conscience.
easy.clue: A borrowed body on a distant moon teaches a soldier where loyalty actually lives.

easy.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
easy.plot: An unlikely group sets out to destroy a powerful ring before a dark ruler can reclaim it.
easy.clue: A group hike goes catastrophically wrong because jewelry is evil.

easy.title: Toy Story
easy.plot: A toy cowboy feels replaced by a flashy newcomer and must learn friendship before both are lost.
easy.clue: A plastic midlife crisis turns into a rescue mission and a lesson in sharing the spotlight.

easy.title: Inception
easy.plot: A skilled thief who steals secrets through dream-sharing is tasked with planting an idea in a target's mind.
easy.clue: A thief enters sleeping minds to plant a thought that feels self-authored.

easy.title: The Shawshank Redemption

easy.clue: Two prisoners trade patience for decades until a wall finally answers back.

easy.title: The Godfather

easy.clue: A family wedding opens a long lesson in loyalty, debt, and inherited power.

easy.title: The Avengers
easy.plot: Earth's mightiest heroes unite to stop a godlike invader from conquering the planet.
easy.clue: A team of incompatible egos becomes the only firewall against a sky-sized invasion.

easy.title: Finding Nemo

easy.clue: An anxious father swims through chaos to recover one very small reason to keep going.

easy.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone

easy.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial

easy.clue: A suburban child shelters a homesick visitor while adults weaponize curiosity.

easy.plot: A farm girl is swept to a magical land and journeys with unusual friends to find a way back home.

medium.title: The Last Duel
medium.plot: A knight challenges his former friend to a trial by combat after his wife accuses the friend of assault.
medium.clue: One accusation fractures three narratives and lets steel arbitrate truth.

medium.title: Se7en
medium.plot: Two detectives hunt a serial killer who stages murders around the seven deadly sins.
medium.clue: A rain-soaked city receives seven lessons in sin, each delivered as a crime scene.

medium.title: Fight Club
medium.plot: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club that evolves into a violent anti-consumer movement.
medium.clue: An exhausted narrator finds purpose in bruises and wakes up inside his own rebellion.

medium.title: The Departed
medium.plot: An undercover cop and a mob mole race to expose each other within police and organized crime.
medium.clue: Two infiltrators mirror each other across law and crime until identity itself is compromised.

medium.title: Shutter Island
medium.plot: A U.S. marshal investigates a disappearance at an isolated psychiatric facility.
medium.clue: A missing-patient case on an island hospital slowly interrogates the investigator instead.

medium.title: Mystic River
medium.plot: Three childhood friends are reunited by tragedy and suspicion after one daughter is murdered.
medium.clue: Old neighborhood trauma resurfaces when one killing forces three men to reopen buried history.

medium.title: Gone Baby Gone
medium.plot: Two private investigators search for a missing child and face moral compromises.
medium.clue: A child abduction case leads two investigators to a choice with no clean winner.

medium.title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
medium.plot: A journalist and a brilliant hacker investigate a decades-old disappearance in a wealthy family.
medium.clue: A disgraced reporter and a lethal researcher dig through a dynasty's frozen secrets.

medium.title: Argo
medium.plot: A CIA operative uses a fake film production as cover to rescue hostages from Tehran.
medium.clue: A geopolitical rescue mission hides inside a movie pitch too absurd to reject.

medium.title: Spotlight
medium.plot: Journalists investigate systemic abuse and institutional cover-ups within a powerful church.
medium.clue: A newsroom follows paperwork and testimony until one city's silence becomes undeniable.

medium.title: The Big Short
medium.plot: A handful of investors predict the housing crash and bet against the financial system.
medium.clue: A few outsiders read the footnotes and wager that the economy is a house of cards.

medium.title: Moneyball
medium.plot: A baseball general manager uses analytics to rebuild a team on a limited budget.
medium.clue: An underfunded team stops shopping for stars and starts buying probabilities.

medium.title: The Imitation Game
medium.plot: A brilliant mathematician leads codebreaking efforts during World War II while concealing personal truths.
medium.clue: A brilliant outsider races to crack a wartime cipher while living behind another one.

medium.title: The Theory of Everything
medium.plot: The life and work of physicist Stephen Hawking unfolds alongside his first marriage.
medium.clue: A young theorist confronts a collapsing body while expanding the universe on paper.

medium.title: Dallas Buyers Club
medium.plot: An HIV-positive man starts an underground network to provide unapproved treatments.
medium.clue: Given a terminal countdown, one man builds a black-market lifeline from defiance.

medium.title: Birdman
medium.plot: A faded actor known for a superhero role mounts a Broadway play while unraveling psychologically.
medium.clue: A former blockbuster icon chases artistic legitimacy while his ego gains wings.

medium.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
medium.plot: A concierge and lobby boy are drawn into a murder mystery and inheritance battle.
medium.clue: A meticulous concierge and his protege sprint through theft, murder, and old-world nostalgia.

medium.title: Jojo Rabbit
medium.plot: A lonely boy in Nazi Germany discovers his mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home.
medium.clue: A child's propaganda fantasy collapses when compassion moves into his attic.

medium.title: Knives Out
medium.plot: A detective investigates the suspicious death of a wealthy novelist amid a dysfunctional family.
medium.clue: A famous writer dies, and inheritance anxiety turns every relative into a suspect.

medium.title: The Hurt Locker
medium.plot: An elite bomb disposal unit operates under intense pressure during the Iraq War.
medium.clue: An expert in defusing bombs becomes addicted to the nearness of explosion.

medium.title: Zero Dark Thirty
medium.plot: An intelligence analyst spends years tracking the world's most wanted terrorist.
medium.clue: A decade-long intelligence hunt narrows from rumors to one compound door.

medium.title: District 9
medium.plot: In segregated Johannesburg, a bureaucrat overseeing aliens is transformed and forced to reevaluate everything.
medium.clue: A paperwork enforcer in an alien ghetto becomes what his system dehumanized.

medium.title: Source Code
medium.plot: A soldier repeatedly inhabits another man's final minutes to prevent a larger attack.
medium.clue: Eight minutes loop endlessly while one mission tries to outrun a second disaster.

medium.title: Predestination
medium.plot: A temporal agent pursues a bomber through paradoxes that entangle his own identity.
medium.clue: A time-travel assignment turns into a closed circuit of identity and causation.

medium.title: Coherence
medium.plot: A dinner party descends into reality fractures after a comet passes overhead.
medium.clue: One suburban dinner splinters when parallel versions of everyone begin arriving.

medium.title: The Martian
medium.plot: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and ingenuity to survive while Earth mounts a rescue.
medium.clue: Left for dead on Mars, one botanist argues with entropy using duct tape and math.

medium.title: Ad Astra
medium.plot: An astronaut travels the solar system to find his missing father and stop mysterious surges.
medium.clue: A stoic astronaut flies farther from Earth to confront a father who never came home.

medium.title: The Shape of Water
medium.plot: A mute cleaner in a Cold War laboratory forms a bond with an amphibious captive.
medium.clue: In a sterile lab, a silent woman and a captive creature invent their own language.

medium.title: Black Swan
medium.plot: A ballerina's pursuit of perfection in Swan Lake pushes her into paranoia and self-destruction.
medium.clue: An artist chasing flawless duality finds her reflection increasingly hostile.

medium.title: The Wrestler
medium.plot: An aging professional wrestler struggles with health, family, and life beyond the ring.
medium.clue: A fading ring legend keeps performing long after his body has filed objections.

medium.title: Nocturnal Animals
medium.plot: A gallery owner receives a manuscript from her ex-husband that mirrors unresolved guilt and revenge.
medium.clue: A manuscript from an ex reopens a marriage autopsy disguised as a thriller.

medium.title: The Place Beyond the Pines
medium.plot: A stunt rider turns to bank robbery to support his son, affecting multiple generations.
medium.clue: One desperate father's crimes echo forward into the sons who inherit the aftermath.

medium.title: Blue Valentine
medium.plot: A marriage is examined through alternating memories of tenderness and present-day collapse.
medium.clue: A love story and a breakup occupy the same timeline and refuse to reconcile.

medium.title: Before Sunrise
medium.plot: Two strangers meet on a train and spend one night walking and talking through Vienna.
medium.clue: Two travelers borrow one city and one night to test whether conversation can become destiny.

medium.title: Before Sunset
medium.plot: Nine years later, two former strangers reunite in Paris for an afternoon before a flight.
medium.clue: A chance reunion years later asks whether timing was ever the real antagonist.

medium.title: Before Midnight
medium.plot: A long-term couple on vacation confronts the strain between ideal love and ordinary life.
medium.clue: Romantic mythology meets middle age and negotiates terms in real time.

medium.title: Minari
medium.plot: A Korean American family moves to rural Arkansas to build a farm and pursue stability.
medium.clue: A family plants a future in unfamiliar soil while each member pays a different cost.

medium.title: The Farewell
medium.plot: A family stages a wedding as cover to gather around their matriarch, who does not know she is dying.
medium.clue: A family reunion disguised as celebration protects one beloved lie.

medium.title: Past Lives
medium.plot: Two childhood friends reconnect across continents and years, contemplating love, fate, and identity.
medium.clue: Two lives drift across oceans and reunite long enough to measure what might have been.

medium.title: Nomadland
medium.plot: After economic collapse, a widow lives on the road and joins a community of modern nomads.
medium.clue: After losing everything fixed, one woman learns to live in motion.

medium.title: Manchester by the Sea
medium.plot: A withdrawn handyman becomes guardian to his teenage nephew after a sudden family death.
medium.clue: A man who left his hometown returns and finds grief has kept his room.

medium.title: The Trial of the Chicago 7
medium.plot: Activists charged after 1968 protests face a politicized courtroom battle.
medium.clue: A protest spills into court where procedure itself becomes part of the prosecution.

medium.title: Captain Phillips
medium.plot: A cargo ship captain is taken hostage by Somali pirates during a tense standoff.
medium.clue: A merchant captain is pulled into a geopolitical hostage crisis one decision at a time.

medium.title: The King's Speech
medium.plot: A reluctant king works with an unorthodox speech therapist to overcome a stammer before wartime broadcasts.
medium.clue: A monarch with a voice obstacle prepares to address a nation entering war.

medium.title: Tinker Tailor Soldier Spy
medium.plot: A retired intelligence officer is asked to uncover a Soviet mole inside British espionage leadership.
medium.clue: A cold-war veteran returns to expose a traitor hidden at the top of his own service.

medium.title: The Fighter
medium.plot: A boxer tries to build his own career while navigating family dysfunction and his brother's addiction.
medium.clue: A promising boxer must escape family gravity before he can claim his own fight.

medium.title: Foxcatcher
medium.plot: An eccentric millionaire sponsors Olympic wrestlers in a relationship that darkens into control and violence.
medium.clue: Patronage, loneliness, and ambition collide on a training mat with tragic consequences.

medium.title: Carol
medium.plot: In 1950s New York, a young photographer and an older woman begin a relationship under social pressure.
medium.clue: A department-store encounter in the 1950s grows into love under surveillance and judgment.

medium.title: The Master
medium.plot: A drifting veteran becomes entangled with a charismatic movement leader and his inner circle.
medium.clue: A damaged drifter and a magnetic leader test whether belonging is healing or control.

medium.title: Nebraska
medium.plot: A son drives his stubborn father across states to claim what may be a fraudulent prize.
medium.clue: A road trip to collect a questionable fortune becomes a slow excavation of family history.

medium.title: A Separation
medium.plot: A couple's divorce and caregiving conflict spirals into legal and moral complexity in Tehran.
medium.clue: A domestic dispute opens into a courtroom puzzle where every truth carries a cost.

medium.title: The Peanut Butter Falcon
medium.plot: A young man with Down syndrome escapes care and journeys to pursue his wrestling dream.
medium.clue: An unlikely duo drifts downriver chasing dignity, family, and a wrestling fantasy.

medium.title: Palm Springs
medium.plot: Two wedding guests become trapped in a time loop and reconsider what gives life meaning.
medium.clue: A wedding day repeats until two trapped strangers decide repetition can still evolve.

medium.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
medium.plot: A woman wakes in an underground bunker and must decide whether her captor is savior or threat.
medium.clue: After a crash, survival means choosing which story in the bunker is the lie.

medium.title: I, Tonya
medium.plot: Figure skater Tonya Harding's rise and scandal are retold through conflicting perspectives.
medium.clue: A sports scandal biography spins through clashing testimonies and class resentment.

medium.title: Another Round
medium.plot: Four teachers test a theory that maintaining a constant blood alcohol level will improve their lives.
medium.clue: Four teachers experiment with sustained intoxication and discover confidence has a bill.

hard.title: Synecdoche, New York
hard.plot: A theater director attempts to stage a complete replica of his life, building an ever-expanding world that consumes him.
hard.clue: A man builds a copy of his life large enough to disappear inside.

hard.title: Stalker
hard.plot: Three men travel through a forbidden zone to reach a room rumored to grant one's deepest desire.
hard.clue: Three men walk toward a room that may know them better than they do.

hard.title: Mulholland Drive
hard.plot: An aspiring actress and an amnesiac woman investigate a strange identity mystery that dissolves into dream logic.
hard.clue: A dream fractures when Hollywood stops pretending.

hard.title: Possession
hard.plot: A couple's violent separation descends into paranoia, madness, and horrifying manifestations of emotional collapse.
hard.clue: A collapsing marriage becomes something physically impossible.

hard.title: Beau Travail
hard.plot: A Foreign Legion officer in Djibouti grows obsessively jealous of a younger recruit, unraveling discipline and purpose.
hard.clue: A soldier loses control long before he loses command.

hard.title: Primer
hard.plot: Two engineers accidentally invent a time machine and become trapped in increasingly tangled loops of secrecy.
hard.clue: Two engineers invent tomorrow by accident and then can't agree which yesterday is real.

hard.title: Under the Skin
hard.plot: An alien woman roams Scotland luring men into a predatory void, while gradually confronting human vulnerability.
hard.clue: A predator wears borrowed beauty until empathy interrupts the hunt.

hard.title: Upstream Color
hard.plot: Two strangers whose lives were manipulated by parasitic control struggle to rebuild identity and connection.
hard.clue: Two damaged strangers trace their stolen selves through parasites, memory gaps, and strange echoes.

hard.title: Burning
hard.plot: A young man becomes consumed by suspicion when a wealthy acquaintance claims to burn abandoned greenhouses.
hard.clue: Jealousy follows a smiling rich man whose hobby may or may not leave smoke.

hard.title: The Holy Mountain
hard.plot: A thief joins a mystic and a band of powerful figures on a surreal quest for immortality and enlightenment.
hard.clue: A spiritual heist escalates into alchemy, satire, and a climb toward manufactured eternity.

hard.title: A Ghost Story
hard.plot: After dying, a man returns as a silent ghost and watches time pass around the home he once shared.
hard.clue: A sheet-covered witness waits in one house long enough for time to change its language.

hard.title: Werckmeister Harmonies
hard.plot: In a bleak town, a giant circus whale and rising unrest expose fragile social order and collective dread.
hard.clue: A town meets a dead giant and slowly rehearses the choreography of collapse.

hard.title: Persona
hard.plot: A nurse cares for an actress who has stopped speaking, and their identities begin to blur in unsettling ways.
hard.clue: One woman goes silent, another keeps talking, and the border between them erodes.

hard.title: The Color of Pomegranates
hard.plot: A poetic, non-linear portrait of the life and inner world of Armenian poet Sayat-Nova.
hard.clue: A poet's life is told as ritual images where symbolism replaces chronology.

hard.title: Satantango
hard.plot: In a decaying Hungarian village, residents await salvation that arrives in the form of manipulation and despair.
hard.clue: A collapsing village waits for a savior and receives a slow choreography of ruin.

hard.title: The Turin Horse
hard.plot: A farmer and his daughter endure repetitive days as wind, darkness, and fatigue consume their isolated world.
hard.clue: A father, a daughter, and relentless wind perform the same day until light itself resigns.

hard.title: Mirror
hard.plot: A dying man reflects on childhood, war, family, and memory in fragmented, dreamlike images.
hard.clue: Memory edits a lifetime into fragments where history and family haunt the same room.

hard.title: The Sacrifice
hard.plot: During the threat of nuclear war, an intellectual bargains with God and promises an extreme sacrifice for peace.
hard.clue: Facing apocalypse, a man makes a private bargain and prepares to pay publicly.

hard.title: Yi Yi
hard.plot: A middle-class Taipei family navigates personal crises, love, loss, and spiritual uncertainty over one year.
hard.clue: One family quietly drifts through work, love, illness, and the small revelations of ordinary time.

hard.title: Uncle Boonmee Who Can Recall His Past Lives
hard.plot: A dying man in rural Thailand is visited by ghosts and memories as he contemplates reincarnation and mortality.
hard.clue: At the edge of death, dinner guests include ghosts and unfinished versions of a soul.

hard.title: Last Year at Marienbad
hard.plot: In an opulent hotel, a man insists he met a woman there the previous year, but memory and truth remain uncertain.
hard.clue: In a palace of echoes, two strangers debate whether their past is memory or invention.

hard.title: Jeanne Dielman, 23 quai du Commerce, 1080 Bruxelles
hard.plot: A widowed mother's rigid domestic routine gradually unravels over three meticulous days.
hard.clue: A precise household routine shifts by inches until one disruption becomes catastrophic.

hard.title: The Discreet Charm of the Bourgeoisie
hard.plot: A group of upper-class friends repeatedly attempts to share a meal but is interrupted by absurd events and dreams.
hard.clue: Polite elites keep trying to eat dinner while reality refuses to cooperate.

hard.title: Fanny and Alexander
hard.plot: Two siblings from a theatrical family endure upheaval after their mother remarries a strict bishop.
hard.clue: Childhood wonder collides with authoritarian piety after a second marriage redraws home.

hard.title: The Double Life of Veronique
hard.plot: Two women in different countries who resemble each other seem mysteriously connected across distance and fate.
hard.clue: Two women share a face, a melody, and a connection neither can fully explain.

hard.title: The Cook, the Thief, His Wife & Her Lover
hard.plot: In a lavish restaurant ruled by a violent gangster, his abused wife begins a secret affair with tragic consequences.
hard.clue: A tyrant dines nightly while desire and revenge simmer in his own dining room.

hard.title: Aguirre, the Wrath of God
hard.plot: A Spanish expedition searching for El Dorado descends into madness under the leadership of an unhinged conquistador.
hard.clue: A jungle expedition chases gold until ambition mutates into delirium.

hard.title: Fitzcarraldo
hard.plot: An eccentric dreamer attempts to build an opera house in the Amazon by hauling a steamship over a mountain.
hard.clue: A dreamer drags a ship uphill to fund opera in the middle of the rainforest.

hard.title: Dogtooth
hard.plot: Parents isolate their adult children from the outside world and control them through fabricated language and rules.
hard.clue: A family builds a private reality where language itself is a cage.

hard.title: Cache
hard.plot: A couple receives anonymous surveillance tapes that force confrontation with buried guilt and colonial violence.
hard.clue: Anonymous tapes arrive, and a comfortable life starts answering for an unburied past.

hard.title: The White Ribbon
hard.plot: In a pre-World War I German village, a series of violent incidents exposes authoritarian cruelty and moral rot.
hard.clue: A village preaches purity while unseen hands rehearse the politics of future violence.

hard.title: Holy Motors
hard.plot: Over one day in Paris, a man travels by limousine performing surreal roles that blur acting and identity.
hard.clue: A man rides through the city changing lives by changing faces, and never arrives as himself.

hard.title: Enter the Void
hard.plot: After a young drug dealer is killed in Tokyo, his spirit drifts through neon memories and out-of-body visions.
hard.clue: A dead narrator floats above neon streets, replaying attachment as afterlife cinema.

hard.title: Antichrist
hard.plot: A grieving couple retreats to a remote cabin where therapy gives way to psychological and physical horror.
hard.clue: Grief retreats to the woods and returns as violence, dread, and unbearable intimacy.

hard.title: Inland Empire
hard.plot: An actress taking a role in a cursed production slips into fragmented identities and nightmarish realities.
hard.clue: An actress enters a role and exits into a maze where identity no longer has edges.

hard.title: Tropical Malady
hard.plot: A tender romance in Thailand transforms into a mythic jungle pursuit that questions desire and transformation.
hard.clue: A love story splits in two, then vanishes into a jungle where desire stalks back.

hard.title: Syndromes and a Century
hard.plot: Mirrored episodes in rural and urban hospitals explore memory, place, and recurring lives in modern Thailand.
hard.clue: Two hospitals, two eras, and recurring gestures suggest memory can inhabit architecture.

hard.title: Embrace of the Serpent
hard.plot: An Amazonian shaman guides two scientists decades apart on spiritual quests tied to colonial exploitation.
hard.clue: A river guide leads two eras of outsiders toward healing, knowledge, and the scars of conquest.

hard.title: Cemetery of Splendour
hard.plot: In a town where soldiers sleep from a mysterious illness, a woman uncovers layers of memory, myth, and politics.
hard.clue: Sleeping soldiers and glowing machines hint that history itself is refusing to wake up.

hard.title: The Assassin
hard.plot: A highly trained killer in ninth-century China is ordered to assassinate a man from her past.
hard.clue: A disciplined blade is sent toward an old bond, and precision becomes hesitation.

hard.title: Son of Saul
hard.plot: In Auschwitz, a prisoner forced into crematorium work seeks to give a dead boy a proper burial.
hard.clue: Inside industrialized death, one man clings to ritual as his final act of resistance.

hard.title: Happy Hour
hard.plot: Four women in Kobe navigate friendship, marriage, and personal change as their lives quietly diverge.
hard.clue: Four friendships absorb the stress fractures of adulthood until old balance finally fails.

hard.title: Long Day's Journey Into Night
hard.plot: A man returns to his hometown seeking a woman from his past, drifting through memory and dreamlike spaces.
hard.clue: A man returns home chasing one vanished woman and falls through memory like a trapdoor.

hard.title: A Pigeon Sat on a Branch Reflecting on Existence
hard.plot: Two novelty salesmen wander through absurd vignettes that expose loneliness, mortality, and human awkwardness.
hard.clue: Deadpan merchants drift through absurd tableaux while existence keeps clearing its throat.

hard.title: Memoria
hard.plot: A woman in Colombia becomes obsessed with a mysterious booming sound only she seems to hear.
hard.clue: A woman hears an impossible sound and follows it into buried time.

hard.title: 8½
hard.plot: A filmmaker in creative crisis retreats into memories, fantasies, and anxiety while preparing a new project.
hard.clue: A director without a film stages his own inner chaos as cinema.

hard.title: Andrei Rublev
hard.plot: Episodes from the life of a medieval icon painter unfold amid violence, faith, and artistic doubt.
hard.clue: An artist of sacred images moves through war and silence, searching for permission to create.

hard.title: Solaris
hard.plot: A psychologist on a space station confronts physical manifestations of memory generated by an alien ocean.
hard.clue: An orbiting station becomes a laboratory where grief takes human form.

hard.title: Nostalghia
hard.plot: A Russian writer in Italy drifts through spiritual longing, memory, and an enigmatic local visionary.
hard.clue: Exile and memory dilute one man until home becomes a metaphysical weather system.

hard.title: Come and See
hard.plot: A Belarusian boy joins partisan fighters and witnesses the atrocities of Nazi occupation.
hard.clue: A child enters war expecting heroism and exits carrying the face of catastrophe.

hard.title: The Ascent
hard.plot: Two Soviet partisans on a supply mission are captured, forcing a brutal moral reckoning.
hard.clue: Captured fighters choose between survival and conscience on a frozen moral cliff.

hard.title: Marketa Lazarová
hard.plot: A medieval clan conflict and kidnapping evolve into a sprawling vision of brutality and desire.
hard.clue: Medieval blood feuds and stolen love combine into a savage national myth.

hard.title: A Brighter Summer Day
hard.plot: In 1960s Taipei, a teenager is pulled into gang rivalry, family pressure, and first love.
hard.clue: Adolescence, politics, and street violence converge until one moment changes everything.

hard.title: Taipei Story
hard.plot: A drifting former baseball player and his partner navigate modernizing Taipei and emotional distance.
hard.clue: Urban progress outpaces two people who can no longer inhabit the same future.

hard.title: Rebels of the Neon God
hard.plot: A disaffected student obsesses over petty criminals in Taipei while drifting from his family.
hard.clue: Alienated youth circles petty crime under neon skies, mistaking fixation for purpose.

hard.title: Millennium Mambo
hard.plot: A young woman narrates her early-2000s life of nightlife, unstable relationships, and uncertainty.
hard.clue: A woman floats through club lights and emotional static, narrating from a distant future.

hard.title: Goodbye, Dragon Inn
hard.plot: On the final night of an old movie theater, workers and patrons wander through loneliness and memory.
hard.clue: A dying cinema hosts ghosts, stragglers, and one last screening before silence.

hard.title: Vive L'Amour
hard.plot: Three lonely strangers unknowingly share an empty apartment while drifting through Taipei.
hard.clue: Three isolated lives overlap in one vacant apartment without truly meeting.

hard.title: The Hole
hard.plot: During floods and disease paranoia, two neighbors communicate through a hole between apartments.
hard.clue: In a quarantined city, a hole in the floor becomes an awkward lifeline.

hard.title: Platform
hard.plot: A troupe of performers travels through rural China as the country transforms in the late 20th century.
hard.clue: A traveling theater drifts across decades while a nation rewrites itself offstage.

hard.title: Still Life
hard.plot: Two people search for missing spouses in a town being demolished by the Three Gorges Dam project.
hard.clue: As a city disappears under development, two strangers search for vanished marriages.

hard.title: An Elephant Sitting Still
hard.plot: Interconnected lives in a bleak Chinese city converge around a rumored elephant in Manzhouli.
hard.clue: Several desperate lives move toward a distant rumor of stillness and escape.

hard.title: Kaili Blues
hard.plot: A doctor searching for his nephew enters a dreamlike journey through memory, time, and identity.
hard.clue: A rural search turns into a time-bending drift where memory becomes geography.

hard.title: The Wild Goose Lake
hard.plot: A gang leader on the run seeks redemption while hunted by police and rivals.
hard.clue: A fugitive navigates neon underworld rules while bargaining with his own final value.

hard.title: Hard to Be a God
hard.plot: On a distant planet stuck in a brutal medieval era, observers from Earth cannot intervene directly.
hard.clue: An observer trapped in endless mud and cruelty learns non-interference has a body count.

hard.title: Leviathan
hard.plot: A mechanic battles a corrupt mayor trying to seize his family property in a Russian coastal town.
hard.clue: One man fights civic corruption and discovers the state always arrives with larger teeth.

hard.title: Loveless
hard.plot: A divorcing couple's son disappears, exposing emotional neglect and social coldness.
hard.clue: A missing child reveals that two adults already abandoned him emotionally.

hard.title: Silent Light
hard.plot: In a Mennonite community, a married farmer falls in love with another woman.
hard.clue: Faith, desire, and duty collide quietly in a landscape where every choice echoes.

hard.title: Post Tenebras Lux
hard.plot: A fragmented portrait of family life, class tension, and surreal interruption in rural Mexico.
hard.clue: Domestic life fractures into class anxiety and surreal intrusions with no clean border.

hard.title: Zama
hard.plot: An 18th-century colonial officer awaits transfer for years as bureaucracy and decay consume him.
hard.clue: A colonial bureaucrat waits for reassignment until waiting becomes his identity.

hard.title: The Headless Woman

hard.clue: A hit-and-run blur is absorbed by privilege, leaving guilt to wander unprocessed.

hard.title: Jauja

hard.title: The Tribe
hard.plot: At a boarding school for deaf students, a new arrival is drawn into violent criminal hierarchies.

hard.title: Winter Sleep

hard.clue: A cultured landlord debates ethics while his own life freezes into self-justifying comfort.

hard.title: Once Upon a Time in Anatolia

hard.title: The Death of Mr. Lazarescu

hard.title: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days

hard.title: Police, Adjective

hard.title: The Great Beauty

hard.clue: A jaded social king wanders Rome asking whether beauty survived the parties.

hard.title: The Square

hard.clue: An art-world moralist loses control of both his message and his own behavior.

hard.title: Borgman
hard.plot: A mysterious drifter infiltrates an affluent family and destabilizes their life.
hard.clue: A stranger enters a wealthy household and quietly turns comfort into dread.

hard.title: Force Majeure
hard.plot: After an avalanche scare, a father's instinctive retreat destabilizes his family dynamic.
hard.clue: One moment of fear on a ski holiday reshapes an entire marriage hierarchy.

hard.title: About Endlessness
hard.plot: A series of still vignettes reflects on love, pain, absurdity, and human persistence.
hard.clue: Brief tableaux of ordinary sorrow and absurdity accumulate into a portrait of being alive.

hard.title: Songs from the Second Floor
hard.plot: Surreal episodes depict spiritual and economic collapse in a modern city.
hard.clue: A society in slow-motion breakdown performs deadpan rituals of collective failure.

hard.title: You, the Living
hard.plot: Dreamlike scenes of ordinary people reveal loneliness, desire, and absurd social routines.
hard.clue: Small human embarrassments and longings unfold like melancholy sketches.

hard.title: Certified Copy
hard.plot: A writer and an antiques dealer spend a day together, shifting between strangers and spouses.
hard.clue: A first meeting in Tuscany gradually performs the possibility of a long marriage.

hard.title: Close-Up
hard.plot: A cinephile impersonates a famous director, leading to a docu-fiction courtroom reflection on identity.
hard.clue: A man impersonates a filmmaker and forces everyone to ask what authenticity really means.

hard.title: Taste of Cherry
hard.plot: A man drives around Tehran seeking someone to assist with his planned suicide.
hard.clue: A driver asks strangers for one final favor and receives philosophies instead of certainty.

hard.title: The Wind Will Carry Us
hard.plot: A film crew waits in a Kurdish village for a funeral ritual while everyday life continues around them.
hard.clue: Outsiders waiting for death in a village slowly confront the life they ignored.

hard.title: Where Is the Friend's House?
hard.plot: A boy crosses villages trying to return his classmate's notebook before punishment falls.
hard.clue: One child's stubborn errand becomes an epic of responsibility and kindness.

hard.title: Landscape in the Mist
hard.plot: Two siblings travel across Greece searching for the father they believe lives in Germany.
hard.clue: Two children walk through a bleak landscape chasing a father-shaped rumor.

hard.title: Eternity and a Day
hard.plot: A terminally ill poet forms a bond with a migrant child while reflecting on unfinished life.
hard.clue: A dying writer and a young stranger share one day that stretches beyond chronology.

hard.title: Ugetsu
hard.plot: Two men pursue ambition during civil war and are tempted by illusion with tragic consequences.
hard.clue: Ambition during wartime leads two men into wealth, ghosts, and irreversible loss.

hard.title: Woman in the Dunes
hard.plot: An amateur entomologist is trapped in a sand pit and forced into a strange domestic captivity.
hard.clue: A man seeking insects is captured by dunes and learns captivity has routines.

hard.title: Sansho the Bailiff
hard.plot: Children separated from their family are sold into slavery and struggle to preserve compassion.
hard.clue: Separated siblings endure cruelty while one moral instruction refuses to die.

hard.title: Harakiri
hard.plot: A ronin requests ritual suicide at a feudal estate to expose hypocrisy and injustice.
hard.clue: A formal request for death unravels into an indictment of samurai honor.

hard.title: Kwaidan
hard.plot: Four stylized ghost stories explore desire, vanity, and supernatural consequence.
hard.clue: Four haunted fables treat beauty, pride, and fear as contracts with the unseen.

hard.title: Funeral Parade of Roses
hard.plot: An avant-garde portrait of Tokyo's queer underground refracts identity, rivalry, and myth.
hard.clue: A fragmented portrait of underground Tokyo remixes identity and tragedy into modern myth.

hard.title: The Face of Another
hard.plot: A disfigured man receives an artificial face and experiments with new identity and morality.
hard.clue: Given a new face, one man discovers anonymity can dissolve ethics.

hard.title: Playtime
hard.plot: A gentle everyman wanders a hyper-modern Paris where architecture and consumer design overwhelm human behavior.
hard.clue: In a maze of glass and modern design, everyday life turns into silent choreography.
